translations.en: I have a lot of stress today.
translations.vi: Hôm nay tôi rất căng thẳng.
translations.nb: I dag er jeg veldig stresset.
translations.da: I dag er jeg meget stresset.
translations.ja: 今日はすごくストレスを感じている。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite lexical verb, present tense, 1st person singular; takes 'Stress' as direct object.
Temporal adverb modifying the clause, indicating time.
Quantifying determiner before 'Stress', indicating a large amount.
Common noun, masculine; direct object of 'habe', quantified by 'viel'.

sentences.target: Sie will am Wochenende keinen Stress.

translations.de: Sie will am Wochenende keinen Stress.
translations.en: She doesn't want any stress on the weekend.
translations.es: Ella no quiere estrés el fin de semana.
translations.fr: Elle ne veut pas de stress le week-end.
translations.it: Lei non vuole stress nel fine settimana.
translations.ru: Она не хочет никакого стресса на выходных.
translations.pt: Ela não quer estresse no fim de semana.
translations.he: היא לא רוצה לחץ בסוף השבוע.
translations.tr: O hafta sonu hiç stres istemiyor.
translations.vi: Cô ấy không muốn căng thẳng vào cuối tuần.
translations.ar: هي لا تريد أي توتر في عطلة نهاية الأسبوع.
translations.nl: Zij wil geen stress in het weekend.
translations.uk: Вона не хоче стресу на вихідних.
translations.hi: वह सप्ताहांत में कोई तनाव नहीं चाहती.
translations.pl: Ona nie chce żadnego stresu w weekend.
translations.el: Εκείνη δεν θέλει καθόλου άγχος το Σαββατοκύριακο.
translations.nb: Hun vil ikke ha stress i helgen.
translations.id: Dia tidak mau ada stres saat akhir pekan.
translations.sv: Hon vill inte ha någon stress på helgen.
translations.ro: Ea nu vrea stres în weekend.
translations.cs: Ona nechce o víkendu žádný stres.
translations.da: Hun vil ikke have stress i weekenden.
translations.fi: Hän ei halua mitään stressiä viikonloppuna.
translations.ja: 彼女は週末はストレスを抱えたくない。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; here functioning as nominative subject (3rd person singular feminine or polite 2nd person).
Modal auxiliary, present tense, 3rd person singular; expresses desire with the noun phrase 'keinen Stress'.
Fused preposition ('an' + article 'dem'); introduces a dative time phrase ('am Wochenende').
Common noun, neuter; object of the preposition 'am' (dative), indicating time.
Negating determiner, accusative masculine singular agreeing with 'Stress'; forms the object 'keinen Stress'.
Common noun, masculine; direct object of 'will' within the NP 'keinen Stress'.

sentences.target: Wir reden über den Stress im Büro.
sentences.reading: /viːɐ̯ ˈʁeːdən ˈyːbɐ deːn ʃtʁɛs ɪm byˈʁoː/

translations.de: Wir reden über den Stress im Büro.
translations.ipa: /viːɐ̯ ˈʁeːdən ˈyːbɐ deːn ʃtʁɛs ɪm byˈʁoː/
translations.en: We're talking about the stress at work.
translations.es: Estamos hablando del estrés en el trabajo.
translations.fr: On parle du stress au travail.
translations.ko: 우리는 회사에서 받는 스트레스에 대해 이야기하고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在谈论工作中的压力。
translations.yue: 我哋喺度傾工作嘅壓力。
translations.pt: Estamos falando do estresse no trabalho.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang nói về căng thẳng ở nơi làm việc.
translations.ar: نحن نتحدث عن التوتر في العمل.
translations.nl: We praten over de stress op het werk.
translations.uk: Ми говоримо про стрес на роботі.
translations.hi: हम काम के तनाव के बारे में बात कर रहे हैं.
translations.el: Μιλάμε για το άγχος στη δουλειά.
translations.nb: Vi snakker om stress på jobben.
translations.id: Kami sedang membicarakan stres di tempat kerja.
translations.sv: Vi pratar om stress på jobbet.
translations.da: Vi taler om stress på arbejdet.
translations.ja: 私たちは仕事のストレスについて話しています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite lexical verb, present tense, 1st person plural; takes a prepositional complement 'über den Stress'.
Preposition governing accusative; introduces the topic phrase.
Definite article, accusative masculine singular; determiner for 'Stress' under the preposition 'über'.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'über'.
Fused preposition ('in' + article 'dem'); introduces a dative locative phrase ('im Büro').
Common noun, neuter; object of the preposition 'im', indicating location (dative).

translations.en: The exam is causing us stress.
translations.es: El examen nos está causando estrés.
translations.pt: A prova está nos causando estresse.
translations.vi: Kỳ thi đang khiến chúng tôi căng thẳng.
translations.hi: परीक्षा से हमें तनाव हो रहा है.
translations.ja: 試験のせいで私たちはストレスを感じている。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative feminine singular; determiner of 'Prüfung'.

Common noun; direct object (accusative) of 'macht'.
